hooks.prompt: Review the conversation. Did a new project get created or completed in this session — meaning a new directory was set up with code files written to it? If YES, output exactly: {"continue": false, "hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "A new project was just completed. You MUST now invoke the create-project-readme skill and write a README.md in the project folder before finishing."}} If NO, output nothing.
